name: Waking Nightmare
description: You target a creature within a short (10 unit) distance and trap them in a terrifying illusion. If your spell check beats the target's resilience, they become Afraid. While you maintain concentration, the target takes 8 psychic damage at the start of each of their turns while they remain Afraid. If the target recovers from the Afraid condition, the spell ends on them.
charge: The target must also beat your spell check to recover from the Afraid condition instead of the normal amount.
